items.title: Echo
items.description: Marketing and documentation site for the Echo HTTP API desktop client (Tauri), with automated deploys and PR previews.

items.title: Card Game
items.description: Browser card table with online play: AWS HTTP + WebSocket APIs, WebRTC table sync, and Terraform-defined infrastructure; static app on a custom domain.

items.title: Kubernetes Portal
items.description: Portfolio mono-repo on EKS: Go API, static portal with public status, Argo CD GitOps, Terraform foundation, Kustomize manifests, and GitHub Actions for CI and deploy.

items.title: IaC-Builder
items.description: Guided IaC wizard (React + Go): live code preview, optional AWS discovery, BYOK OpenAI assist, operator guardrails, Docker Compose, and AWS serverless deploy.

items.title: Corporate Projects
items.description: Public summary of enterprise DevOps, cloud, automation, and developer tooling work.

items.title: Portfolio Source
items.description: The generator, YAML content, and deployment workflow for this site.

items.title: Analytics
items.description: Shared analytics surface for portfolio and related apps.
